Comparison Documentation
========================

Purpose
-------
This section helps choose the right RTOS for product constraints.

Comparison Dimensions
---------------------
- License model and ecosystem maturity
- Footprint and performance profile
- Tooling and debug experience
- Safety/certification alignment
- Networking and middleware availability

Planned Pages
-------------
- ``rtos_comparison_table.rst``
- ``rtos_selection_guide.rst``
